lista.title: Projects
lista.subtitle: Support real-impact projects. Your capital is always recoverable.
lista.howDesc: Your MXNe enters the contract — not our account, the code. The yield funds the project and you recover your capital in full when the project ends.
lista.emptyHint: Be the first to create one!

detalle.safetyMsg: Capital guaranteed by smart contract on Stellar.
detalle.locked: Capital locked — available when project is released
detalle.youWillReceive: You will receive in your wallet
detalle.abandonConfirm: Are you sure you want to abandon this project? Anyone will be able to take control.
detalle.abandonedBanner: This project was abandoned. You can take control and continue it.
detalle.releasedBanner: Goal reached. You can withdraw your capital.
detalle.errYieldOnly: Yield can only be claimed when the project is released.
detalle.errNoYield: No yield accumulated yet. Wait at least 1 minute.
detalle.errContract: Contract error. Please try again in a few seconds.
detalle.toastContributed: You contributed ${{amount}} MXNe to the project
detalle.toastYield: Yield claimed and sent to your wallet
detalle.toastContinued: You are now the new project owner

crear.title: Register project
crear.descPlaceholder: What does your project do and for whom?
crear.yieldNote: ~9.45% CETES + ~4% AMM · with 100% goal funded for {{months}} month{{plural}}
crear.docsPrivacyTitle: Your documents never leave your device
crear.docsPrivacyDesc: Only a digital fingerprint (SHA-256) is uploaded to the blockchain. This protects your privacy and assures backers that the project has an identified owner.
crear.docIneDesc: Of the project owner (image or PDF)
crear.docsTip: You can upload drafts — what matters is that the project is real and traceable.
crear.hashNote: This fingerprint will be stored on the Stellar blockchain. No one can forge it.
crear.yieldInfoTitle: Your backers contribute capital, they don't donate — that builds greater trust.
crear.yieldInfoThey: , they get back what they put in when the project ends.
crear.errTime: Estimated time must be between 1 and 120 months.
crear.errDocs: You must upload all three documents before continuing.
crear.errHash: Error processing documents. Please try again.
crear.errCreate: Error creating project. Please try again.

cuenta.title: My account
cuenta.noProjects: You haven't created any projects yet
cuenta.noProjectsHint: When you create a project it will appear here.
cuenta.noContributions: You haven't supported any projects yet
cuenta.noContributionsHint: Explore active projects and contribute to see them here.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.allClearHint: No projects pending review at this time.
admin.rejectPlaceholder: Describe the reason so the creator can fix it…

transp.title: Public Transparency
transp.subtitle: Real-time data from Stellar smart contract. No intermediaries.
transp.emptyHint: Projects will appear here when created.
transp.infoDesc: This information comes directly from the smart contract on Stellar Testnet. It cannot be manipulated.
transp.errorLoad: Could not load data. Check your connection.

recompensas.label: Your rewards
recompensas.remaining: {{amount}} MXNe to go until next level
recompensas.tip: 💡 Rewards are calculated on the total MXNe contributed across all Bimex projects. Surprise gifts are sent to your Stellar wallet.
recompensas.unlocked: ✅ Reward unlocked in your Bimex profile.
recompensas.unlockedHint: Physical gifts/NFTs will be managed soon.
